parameters.title: Spectra indicator permutation selection
parameters.label: Select spectra for specific indicator and model using univariate selection.

parameter.hint: The root fp of the project
The dataframe to use as input, raw = original spectra, previous = the latest saved parquet file(s), or state the name of the parquet file with spectra derived from earlier step(s) to use as input.
Comma separated list of the indicators to use for univariate selection
Comma separated list of the indicators to use for univariate selection, valid entries: permutation, rfe,tree_based
Comma separated list of the regressor to apply, valid entries: ols, theilsen, huber, knn, detree, svr, mlp, cubist, plsr.
The parameterisation for each selector if applied, if not set to default you have to give the relative or absolute path.
If the selection should be done sepately for each indicator, false = all indicators in one selection (single dataframe output); true= individual dataframes will be created for each indicator.
Relative or absolute path to the JSON file with regressor hyperparameters. If not set, uses the package default.
Maximum number of features to show in the selector bar plot. 0 = show all. Y-axis labels are suppressed when showing more than 40 features.
Name of the matplotlib colormap to use
